data: {"generalSituation":"A southerly airstream will bring hot weather to the coast of southern China tomorrow. The trough of low pressure now over the northern part of southern China will develop into a cold front tomorrow, and move across the coastal areas on Thursday. Under the influence of the associated northeast monsoon, temperatures over Guangdong will fall in the latter part of this week. Meanwhile, under the influence of upper-air disturbances, the weather will be unsettled with showers and thunderstorms over the region. With the upper-air disturbances departing, the weather will improve slightly over the coast of Guangdong early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260422","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods. Hot during the day.
